case_title: CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATIONS, INC., VS. WILLIAM THOMAS BROWN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-09-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $301.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. (610/BCHAN)
